Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Marketing_Resources.asp

# SBDC Marketing and Market Research Resource Hub

## Resource type
Marketing, market research, and demand-generation resources.

## Best for
Users needing customer research, competitor research, industry intelligence, marketing plan, marketing checklist, social media, SEO/SEM, digital advertising, content, analytics, and marketing specialist help.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stages
Validation, Launch, Operations, Growth.

## Use when the entrepreneur says
"Who are my customers?" "How do I market this?" "I need competitor research," "I need a marketing plan," "I need more customers."

## Resource summary
The page highlights SBDCNet, Vertical IQ, marketing webinars/blogs, social media webinars/blogs, marketing trends, marketing plan template, marketing checklist, and marketing specialists.

## What the user can do with this resource
Use resource links, request advising, watch webinars, and ask for market research support.

## BOSS routing notes
This is one of the most important Phase 2 Validation resources because it supports market and customer evidence before spending heavily.

## Related source URLs
- https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Consulting1.asp

## BOSS Library use notes
- Treat this as a resource-routing document, not as legal, tax, lending, certification, or procurement advice.
- Use the linked source URL as the user-facing official link.
- Ask discovery questions before routing when the user is early-stage or unclear.
- For Houston/77084 users, verify county/service-area fit through the official SBDC/SBA locator before giving a final local-office referral.
